name: Chicken Fried Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and butter in a medium saucepan. Bring the mixture to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and add the flour, stirring vigorously until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan and forms a smooth ball. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
3. Add one egg at a time, beating with a wooden spoon after each addition until the batter is smooth.
4. Drop the batter by scant one-third cupfuls about 3 inches apart onto lightly greased baking sheets. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 40 minutes or until golden brown and puffed.
5. Cool the puffs on wire racks away from drafts.
6. Cut off the top of each puff, pull out and discard most of the soft dough inside.
7. Fill the bottom halves with vanilla ice cream. Cover with the top halves.
8. Wrap in aluminum foil and freeze until ready to serve.
Just before serving, remove the puffs from the foil and deep fry in hot oil (350°F) until golden brown.
